column1: Hey Valentina, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you! Which destination were you lookin to book
we were looking into punta cana! but what are the other options that aren't in mexico, if any?
Yea honestly Punta Cana is the best it's where I'll be. Theres also Bahamas
How many ppl in your group?
okay we can look at both options because we also talked abt the bahamas
Cool yea np. You all from the same school?
oh dope yea we have a handful of groups from there. y'all energy is always 10/10 lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
yea I got you. ill add a discount in there for you too
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dopeee whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if it came through
got it! i'll go through it with my group and get back to you!

good morning! we liked the punta cana packages! could we see those with the flights (out of nashville) so we can compare and see more information about the add ons for off resort party and excursions please? thanks again for all the assistance!
also wanted to confirm about the room since it says 4 people per room but we are a group of 5. thank you!!
hey hey good morning! yea would be awesome to have y'all in Punta Cana with me
i'll look at flight options now, but its def cheaper to get flights separately on your own. depends on if youd rather the convenience of it all being all together in one, or to save money
were you thinking the 4 night stay, or the 5 night? for the duration
could we see both if that's not too much work haha
Loved “i'll look at flight options now, but its def cheaper to get flights separately on your own. depends on if youd rather the convenience of it all being all together in one, or to save money”
hey so its def cheapest for you to get flights separately on your own
here's a couple that I found that would work well for you
Actually looks like all good flights without a super long layover are around that price

for the add ons, the party pass is what most people get. it comes with coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off-resort nightclub events like Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and Maroca Nightclub
here's the vibe at imagine cave https://youtu.be/RXvcdVqvARU
is there options for just like 1 or 2 nights for those?
yea! you can add those as individual nights right from your portal when we get your reservation started

also wanted to confirm about the room since it says 4 people per room but we are a group of 5. but we're definitely convinced haha our group just needs to have to look and agree on flights and final pricing 😁
okay cool so yea max occupancy per room for most all inclusive resorts is 4 ppl. so for 5 ppl we'd have to do a room of 3 and a room of 2
how would that affect the price then
or would there be a way to get one of the rooms that accommodates 5?
yea there arent 5 person room accommodations unfort

if we do the 4 night stay I can get it down pretty low for you. at standard its $670 per person for the 3 person room and $726 for the 2 person room. but I can get it down though and even the price out for everyone across the board. Let me see what I can work out
were y'all lookin to start booking tonight?

Loved “if we do the 4 night stay I can get it down pretty low for you. at standard its $670 per person for the 3 person room and $726 for the 2 person room. but I can get it down though and even the price out for everyone across the board. Let me see what I can work out”
i don't know how soon everyone else will be ready but definitely trying to get everything sorted out asap
could we see the quotes for the 2 & 3 person rooms for saying 4 & 5 nights and yeah if there's any way possible u can even out anything that would be totally amazing
and thanks again for your support and patience!! everyone is still trying to get on the same page budget wise 🙏
yea so those base prices are in the quotes in the original email. like if you wanted the quote in link form
when you click on the view quote buttons, itll show you the pricing for 4 person room, 3 person room, and 2
That'll be the base pricing where you can click through the diff options for a visual
As far as what I can discount / even it out to I'm working on now but it is pretty dependent on when everyone will be ready to get started. I'll send what it'll be if y'all were to book today
if we were to roll today with the 4 night it would be $649 per person, one room of 3 and one room of 2
Loved “if we were to roll today with the 4 night it would be $649 per person, one room of 3 and one room of 2”
ok sorry for the delay but we are thinking the 2 rooms for 5 nights 799 each!
perfect! what are the next steps?
ill send over the reservation in 5!
just emailed over your res! lmk if you need any help navigating through
perfect thank you! is it okay if we take a min getting those in? just didn't know if they needed to be in by a certain date or anything since we're still figuring out our flights
how much time did you need?
the 799 pricing is what I was able to get for today, just a heads up
it could be diff another day
i think we're all agreed but just to have some wiggle room for everyone to get it in
also is there an option to add extras later? or we have to do it when we buy the package soon
if we could all have until like end of day tomorrow if that's good to get our packages booked
yea I'm workin on it for you, will know soon
hey all set for the same price for for deposit between now and tomorrow at midnight
the add on options you have until 2 days before your trip to add onto your account, so no rush on adding those right away
thank you so much for all the help!! ur amaze!
Hiii! Just wanted to let you know that I referred you guys to a friend and their group need up booking you guys too!!
Happy to have yall rollin with us
Hi Spiffy!! We are so hype to be one month away!! I had a quick question about the party packages! If we get one do we get to chose what night we go to Coco Bongo??
hey hey. so theres two options per week you can go to coco bongo, our check in staff usually selects your date based on your arrival and how many other groups we have going on each day
yo Valentina! I just emailed over an e-ticket link to fill out and where to find our transportation service when you land next weekend
did y'all want to get any other party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Hi Spiffy! Thank you! We just did the coco bongo package!
okay dope! lmk if you need anything else
Hi Spiffy! Is there a way to choose our Coco Bongo day for Sunday preferably so we can go with 2 other groups we know? Thanks!
Hey hey. I think you should be good, they typically assign your Coco Bongo date based on your arrival date. udually the Sunday is for people that leave Wednesday and can't make it
But you may be able to ask the party pass desk when youre redeeming your tickets for the week, if you can go Sunday. no guarantees they'll say yes but its def worth the ask
yo! safe travels today, see y'all out here soon
